items.text: There is a fragment of telegraph tape in a climate-controlled drawer in Massachusetts. The collector???an estate lawyer who inherited it from a client???keeps the basement office at sixty-two degrees. He doesn't display the artifact. He doesn't know what he has. The tape occupies drawer fourteen-C.

items.text: Fourteen kilohertz. The exact frequency of the hum Dane Tesla heard in the cellar beneath his father's church. The exact frequency of the vibration he felt in his fingertips when he pushed his hand into the beam of white light.
